title: 12PCS Bubble Pipe, Blow Up Ball, Glow Ball Game for Kids Birthday Parties, Family Gatherings and Outdoor Play with Floating Glow Balls, Easy Blow Pipes and Portable Set
features: Complete Game Set Contents: This set includes durable bubble pipe tools and vibrant blow up ball accessories for interactive fun. The bubble pipe is designed for easy blowing, and the blow up ball floats to create engaging glow ball game experiences during play.

Interactive and Engaging Play: Use the bubble pipe to keep the blow up ball airborne with controlled breath. This blow up ball activity is perfect for ball games that encourage teamwork and laughter among players.
Active and Engaging Play: This glow ball game provides a fun way to practice breath control and coordination. The bubble pipe and floating ball create an entertaining activity for players.

Versatile for Various Occasions: Ideal for parties, holidays, or outdoor events, this glow ball game offers entertainment for all ages. The bubble pipe and blow up ball set adapts to different ball games, making it a hit at family gatherings or community activities.

Portable and Easy to Store: Lightweight and compact, the bubble pipe and blow up ball are convenient for travel and storage. This glow ball game set can be easily carried for spontaneous ball games, fun wherever you go.
